subject: [PATCH v2 067/110] proc: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is re-posting the same patch description, which suggests they are not addressing any specific feedback or concerns from reviewers.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer Jan Kara approved the patch and added a Reviewed-by tag, indicating that he has reviewed the code.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the use of PRIino format macro in proc files with concrete format strings %llu and %llx, which are suitable for u64 type i_ino values.
